name: Breakfast Chicken Hash
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop leftover or cooked chicken into small cubes.
2. In a bowl, mix chicken with cream or leftover gravy.
3. Season with salt, pepper and tarragon.
4. Melt butter in a shallow baking dish.
5. Turn the chicken mixture into the baking dish.
6. Sprinkle with parsley and pimiento.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes.
8. Serve with corn cakes or waffles.
